# terminal_profile (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "terminal_profile" "example_profile" {
  email = "john@example.com"
  name = "John Doe"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `data` (Attributes) A Terminal shop user's profile. (We have users, btw.) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Read-Only:

- `user` (Attributes) A Terminal shop user. (We have users, btw.) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data--user))

<a id="nestedatt--data--user"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data.user`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Email address of the user.
- `fingerprint` (String) The user's fingerprint, derived from their public SSH key.
- `id` (String) Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.
- `name` (String) Name of the user.
- `stripe_customer_id` (String) Stripe customer ID of the user.
